label: preupdate-coord-root
whatThisFinds: Player owner pointer root — dereference to reach the player object (coordinates at +0x320, facing target at +0x30C, candidate/support yaw-adjacent scalar at +0x304)

validation.instructions: After capturing, validate by restarting RIFT and running: dotnet run --project reader/RiftReader.Reader -- --process-name rift_x64 --scan-module-pattern "<aob>" --json
